calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rodolfo Velasquez (209-487-98760 plaintiff and moving party in Pro Per / Jessica Ehsanian (415-675-3400) of Brian Cave LLP for Bank of America defendant and opposing party

Discussion - The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend, plaintiff to allege tender, breach of enforceable implied contract, legal duty of care and fraud with particularity; other cause of action stand or fall on issues addressed above. Plaintiff to file amended complaint within 10 days. Order signed and filed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Smith, Not reported (D501)

Ntc And Motion For Reconsideraton Or To Vacate The Court'S Order Re: Amount Of Bond
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Russell Davis of Law Offices of Russell Davis (415-409-5627) appearing for plaintiff Rodolfo Velasquez moving party.
Atty. Jesstch Ehsantan of Bryan Cave (415-675-3400) appearing for defendant Bank of American N.A. moving party.

Argued - Court ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF RODOLFO VELASQUEZ's Motion For Reconsideration Or To Vacate The Court'S Order Re: Amount Of Bond is Denied, plaintiff's motion void of any legal basis for motion to vacate and fails to meet standard of 1008 motion. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Continued To Nov-09-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: deFENDANTs BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. COUNTRYWIDE HOME LOANS, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT to be heard in Department 501, the housing court, on November 9, 2012 at 9:30 am. Judge: Harold Kahn Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

Mtn Of Prelim Injunction
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Russell Davis of Law Offices of Russell Davis (415-409-5627) appearing for Rodolfo Velasquez moving party.
Atty. Jessica Ehsanian of Bryan Cave LLP (415-675-3400) appearing for defendant Bank of American N.A. moving party.

Argued- Tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF RODOLFO VELASQUEZ's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is Granted preliminary injunction. Appears plaintiff can prevail on breach of contract. Both parties prepare order and leave the bond in blank. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)

Mtn Of Prelim Injunction
Off Calendar Aug-30-2012 Continued To Sep-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF RODOLFO VELASQUEZ'S Motion Of Preliminary Injunction will be heard in Department 501, the housing court, at 9:30 am on September 6, 2012. Opposing party is required to provide Department 501 with courtesy copies of the opposition papers no later than 4:00 pm on August 30, 2012 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
